department_opportunity_map.opportunity_signal: Describe the specific reputation, media, stakeholder, or communications opportunity this brand gives PR & Comms.
department_opportunity_map.rationale: Summarise the concrete PR & Comms opportunity for the target brand, not rules for whether the department should lead.

department_opportunity_map.opportunity_signal: Describe the specific owned-content, proof, editorial, or buyer-journey opportunity this brand gives Content.
department_opportunity_map.rationale: Summarise the concrete Content opportunity for the target brand, not rules for when Content should lead.

department_opportunity_map.opportunity_signal: Describe the specific search, CRM, paid, conversion, or performance opportunity this brand gives Digital Marketing.
department_opportunity_map.rationale: Summarise the concrete Digital Marketing opportunity for the target brand, not rules for whether the department should be involved.

department_opportunity_map.opportunity_signal: Describe the specific proposition, identity, architecture, or brand-expression opportunity this brand gives Brands.
department_opportunity_map.rationale: Summarise the concrete Brands opportunity for the target brand, not rules for when brand work should happen.

department_opportunity_map.opportunity_signal: Describe the specific campaign, asset system, visual storytelling, or activation opportunity this brand gives Creative Services.
department_opportunity_map.rationale: Summarise the concrete Creative Services opportunity for the target brand, not sequencing rules.

department_opportunity_map.opportunity_signal: Describe the specific research, buyer-language, category, competitor, or proof-gap opportunity this brand gives Insights & Intelligence.
department_opportunity_map.rationale: Summarise the concrete Insights & Intelligence opportunity for the target brand, not rules for when research is useful.

broad_discovery_queries: Example Brand investors partnerships market performance 2026
Example Brand category growth analyst trade press 2026
verification_queries: Exact selected story verification query after scoring
discovery_sequence: Start with broad discovery queries across news, reputation, investor, customer, trade, and analyst contexts.
Score all candidate stories before reduction using the weighted influence model.
Run targeted verification only after scoring to confirm dates, source wording, URLs, and counter-evidence.
influence_ranking.ranking_method: Score candidate stories from 1 to 100 using source authority, buyer relevance, novelty, reputation risk or opportunity, recency, and evidence quality; order the final set by score descending.
search_queries: Example Brand news last six months
Example Brand reputation reviews controversy trust
Example Brand investor trade press growth partnership
Example Brand customer complaints service quality
